rationale: No corpus data and no named-company per-level anchor found for senior embedded roles at seed/Series A-B startups specifically. General blog/aggregator claims (e.g., 'Bay Area senior embedded ~$200K base', 'hardware startup senior embedded $185K-$250K total comp') are unsourced, non-startup-stage-specific, and not verifiable against a named company — too weak to anchor confidence. Keeping low; this reflects genuine lack of public disclosure at this company stage, not a failed search.
